## Describe the bug

A clear, short description of what’s wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

1. …
2. …
3. …

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened.

## Environment

- **BanglaType version / source:** (e.g. 1.0.0 from Releases, or “built from main”)

## Additional context

Logs, screenshots, or other details if helpful.
